cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Show of Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 1 for each of your [Mighty] units. (A unit is Mighty while it has 5+ :rb_might:.).

cardPlayed.name: Acceptable Losses
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Each player kills one of their gear.

cardPlayed.name: Void Rush
cardPlayed.text: Reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one of them, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_2:. Draw any you did not play this way.

cardPlayed.name: Reinforce
cardPlayed.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your Main Deck. You may play a unit from among them. Its Energy cost is reduced by :rb_energy_5:. Then recycle the remaining cards.

cardPlayed.name: Unyielding Spirit
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction]_ (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)_
Prevent all spell and ability damage this turn.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Consult the Past
cardPlayed.text: HIDDEN (Hide now for [rune] to react with later for [0].) REACTION (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.) Draw 2.

cardPlayed.name: Fight or Flight
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

cardPlayed.name: Singularity
cardPlayed.text: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

cardPlayed.name: Guards!
cardPlayed.text:
[Hidden]_ (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)_
Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token. You may pay :rb_rune_order: to ready it.

cardPlayed.name: Blind Fury
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Each opponent reveals the top card of their Main Deck. Choose one and play it, ignoring its cost. Then recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Discipline
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn. Draw 1.

cardPlayed.name: Portal Rescue
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Banish a friendly unit, then its owner plays it to their base, ignoring its cost.

cardPlayed.name: Feral Strength
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit +2 :rb_might: this turn.

cardPlayed.name: Stacked Deck

[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

cardPlayed.name: Promising Future
cardPlayed.text: Each player looks at the top 5 cards of their Main Deck, chooses one, then recycles the rest. Starting with the next player, each player plays those cards, ignoring Energy costs. (They must still pay Power costs.).

cardPlayed.name: Find Your Center
cardPlayed.text:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
If an opponent's score is within 3 points of the Victory Score, this costs :rb_energy_2: less.
Draw 1 and channel 1 rune exhausted.

cardPlayed.text: Reveal the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. You may play one of them, reducing its cost by :rb_energy_2:. Draw any you did not play this way.

cardPlayed.name: Hard Bargain
cardPlayed.text:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)

cardPlayed.name: Arise!
cardPlayed.text: Play a 2 :rb_might: Sand Soldier unit token for each Equipment you control. Then ready two of them.

cardPlayed.name: Noxian Guillotine
cardPlayed.text:
[Action]_ (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)_
Choose a unit. Kill it the next time it takes damage this turn.
[Legion] — Kill it now instead. (Get the effect if you've played another card this turn.).
